title: Lightweight Recipes
description: Adds more ways of obtaining blocks or items that won't heavily affect gameplay!
body:
This mod adds more ways of obtaining blocks or items that won't heavily affect gameplay!

**What's Included:**

- Name Tag Crafting
- Anvil Repairing With an Anvil
- Sand to Glass Blasting
- Soul Sand to Tinted Glass Smelting and Blasting
- Extra Way of Crafting a Soul Campfire
- Saddle Crafting
- Double Tall Grass/Fern Crafting
- Natural Generation of Wet Sponges in Deep Lukewarm Oceans, Lukewarm Oceans, Warm Oceans, and Oceans
- Full JEI support

_This mod will continue to update as time goes on!_

**Please report any bugs/suggestions on the Discord.**

_Made with MCreator - Go check it out!_

_Feel free to use this in your modpack! I'd prefer credit in a link to this mod page._

_I do not permit anyone to reupload this mod onto any other website without my permission. Please report any project not following this guideline._
